query:
SELECT pc.id, pc.name, COUNT(pq.id) as question_count 
FROM position_categories pc 
LEFT JOIN position_questions pq ON pc.id = pq.categoryId 
WHERE pc.positionId = 8 
GROUP BY pc.id, pc.name 
ORDER BY pc.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46m8FvVm7HSsc1z.root --database 6XmnMHSGkmqmcvGw6sxZ3M --execute SELECT pc.id, pc.name, COUNT(pq.id) as question_count 
FROM position_categories pc 
LEFT JOIN position_questions pq ON pc.id = pq.categoryId 
WHERE pc.positionId = 8 
GROUP BY pc.id, pc.name 
ORDER BY pc.id;
